wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Glitter|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Glam|2}}{{R|Glitter||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}. After pickup, every card reward is [[Slay the Spire 2:Enchantments|Enchanted]] with {{KW|Glam||2}}.

== Sources ==
At the start of {{2|Acts#Act 3|Act 3}}, '''Glitter''' can be offered by {{KW|Nonupeipe||2}}.

== Interactions ==
=== Neutral ===
*If the player purchased {{R|Wing Charm||2}} ''before'' they received '''Glitter''', each card reward will feature one card with {{KW|Swift||2}} 1 and two cards with {{KW|Glam||2}}.
**However if {{R|Wing Charm||2}} is purchased ''after'' receiving '''Glitter''', then ''all'' cards will have {{KW|Glam||2}}.

== Update History ==

*'''Early Access v0.98'''
**Added Glitter to the game.
